title: REFUGEE RECEPTION AND PLACEMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST PORTLAND OFFICE REFUGEE RECEPTION AND PLACEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management services assisting with processing paperwork, signing up for government assistance programs, information about employment programs, ESL classes, and other barriers in regard to refugee status. Additionally provides a sponsor based accommodation program. 7931 NE Halsey Street Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Refugees who have been in the US for a period of 8 months or less Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2:30pm Email (971) 888-7831 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 888-7831 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Arabic, Somali, Russian, Burmese, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus stops and MAX station nearby Services: Refugee Resettlement Services Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON REFUGEE SCHOOL IMPACT PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MULTICULTURAL COUNSELING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST PORTLAND OFFICE
